summary: Classified the 10 open PRs in this mixed live-inventory shard independently. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive refs were present, and no close/merge/fix actions were planned because the job disables instant close, merge, fix, and raise_pr paths. Maintainer review is needed only for PRs already marked ready with sufficient proof or compatibility/product judgment.
